item.title: How to Start a Career in IT: A Step-by-Step Guide for Beginners
item.category: "how to start a career in IT" , "IT career beginner" , "IT with no experience" , "CompTIA A+" , "IT first job" , "IT entry level" , "start IT career" , "IT career steps" , "IT career guide 2026"
item.description: A practical, step-by-step guide to starting a career in Information Technology with no prior experience — certifications, home labs, first jobs, and what to prioritize.
